events.title: Preschool Soccer Clinic
events.description: Players enjoy the excitement of soccer through a variety of challenges, mini games and fun competitions. Staff emphasize passing, dribbling and shooting skills.

events.title: Youth Canvas Painting Workshop
events.description: Whether you love to paint or have never painted before, this workshop is a lot of fun! Follow the instructor through the steps of creating a beautiful painting while adding your own style.

events.title: World Percussion & Drumming
events.description: Unleash your rhythm! Explore the Djembe and world percussion in this high-energy class. Master traditional rhythms and chants from Africa to South America while mastering the art of the drum circle.

events.title: Family Yoga
events.description: Explore yoga together in a playful setting with storybooks, yoga games, postures and partner yoga. Increase body awareness, strength and flexibility with poses, mindfulness and breathing techniques.

events.title: Ukulele - Beginning
events.description: Join this joyful class that inspires curiosity about music. Learn to tune the instrument, play multiple chords, clap rhythms, and play several simple songs. Class ends with a ukulele performance for family and friends. All equipment provided.

events.title: Pontoon Boat Ride - Sunset Cruise
events.description: Enjoy an evening cruise on Monona, Mendota or both. Hopefully catch the sunset from the water. Rides are first come, first served.

events.title: Mobile Madison - Free Community Event
events.description: A collaborative free event bringing mobile programs to the community including Clay on the Move, Play on the Move, Art Cart, Big Red Reading Bus, Fishmobile, Dream Bus, Movies in the Park and more.

events.title: Youth Theater Troupe
events.description: Introduces young performers to acting through fun and interactive games. Explore fundamentals of voice, movement and expression. Program concludes with a showcase performance.

events.title: Legends of Lambeau Day Trip
events.description: Behind the scenes Champion tour of Lambeau Field including the rooftop loft, field atrium, club level suite and a walk to the field sideline. Lunch buffet included. Explore the Hall of Fame museum at your own pace.

events.title: Intro to Kayak
events.description: Learn the basics to start paddling safely. Introductory information about boats, safety equipment, water safety and paddling techniques. Great for first timers.

events.title: Adult Watercolor Painting - Beginning
events.description: Learn to love working with watercolor by applying simple techniques. Class includes time for demonstrations and experimentation. Complete paintings using simple subjects and limited color.

events.title: Adapted Swim - Free
events.description: Free adapted swims open to all individuals with disabilities and their caregivers and families. Pre-registration is not required.

events.title: Zumba
events.description: It's a party and a workout! Zumba is an aerobic dance fitness class that combines international music and movement.

events.title: Camp Tall Oaks - Adventure Awaits
events.description: Outdoor summer camp at Madison School Forest. Get ready for a week of thrilling outdoor adventures focusing on excitement, exploration, skill development and personal growth. Explore hidden trails and discover the wonders of the natural world.

events.title: MSCR Centennial Celebration
events.description: Party, Reunion & Fundraiser celebrating 100 years of MSCR. Refreshments, beverages, activities and fun! A special fundraiser sponsored by Friends of MSCR.

events.title: Pickleball - Youth Beginner
events.description: Introductory class covering the basics of pickleball gameplay, rules, hand eye coordination and basic skills. Emphasis on ball contact and keeping the ball in play.

events.title: Family Campout
events.description: Whether new to camping or wanting an activity-filled overnight at Madison School Forest, enjoy survival skills, a night hike with stargazing, campfire cooking, and orienteering. Tents provided. Snacks, dinner and breakfast included.

events.title: Milwaukee Zoo Day Trip
events.description: Spend a fun-filled day at the Milwaukee County Zoo, home to animals from around the world and engaging exhibits for all ages. Transportation provided. Participants may bring their own lunch or purchase at the zoo.

events.title: Running Club - Youth
events.description: Youth training group for novice to intermediate runners. Each workout focuses on building running skills through speedwork, hill training, endurance workouts and running games.

events.title: Limnology: Study of Freshwater - Pontoon Tour
events.description: Interactive hands-on tour where you learn how scientists study lakes and try water quality monitoring with scientific tools. Hear how communities address stressors like climate change and invasive species. Great for youth and adults.
